rows.title: Repair TikTok executor
rows.evidence: tiktok_credentials_missing Missing secrets: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN. Local secret source is missing: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN.
rows.next_step: Missing worker secrets: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN. TikTok public posting approval is false. Local secret source is also missing: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN. Complete TikTok OAuth/public posting setup locally, then push secrets and refresh Admin.
